message:
feat(ftui): analytics TUI plumbing — view router, filters, palette commands (2noh9.4.18.2)

Adds the complete analytics surface navigation infrastructure:

- AppSurface enum (Search | Analytics) with view_stack for back-navigation
- AnalyticsView enum (7 subviews: Dashboard, Explorer, Heatmap, Breakdowns, Tools, Cost, Coverage)
- AnalyticsFilterState struct with time range, agents, workspaces, source filter
- 8 new CassMsg variants for analytics navigation and filtering
- 7 PaletteAction variants + palette items for "Analytics: <view>" commands
- PaletteAction dispatch in update() routing to AnalyticsEntered + AnalyticsViewChanged
- Esc from analytics pops back to search via view stack
- Placeholder analytics surface rendering with view tabs and filter summary
- Legacy tui.rs compatibility (analytics actions show ftui-only message)
- Analytics query library (src/analytics/) with bucketing, derive, query, types modules
- Bridge impls in lib.rs for CLI types → analytics library types
- 17 new tests covering surface routing, filter state, palette actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","title":"Task: Analytics drilldown -> Search (push filters + time range + dim; preserve back stack)","description":"## Goal
Make analytics actionable by enabling drilldown into the core cass search experience.

If a chart shows a spike, the user must be able to jump straight to the sessions/messages that caused it.

## Behavior
- Enter on any analytics selection (bucket, row, tool, model) should:
  1. push a new view on the navigation stack (Search view)
  2. pre-fill time filters (since/until) to the selected bucket
  3. apply inherited global filters (agent/workspace/source)
  4. apply the selection’s dimension filter (e.g., agent=codex or workspace=/foo)
  5. leave query empty by default (user types next)

- Esc from Search returns back to Analytics with prior selection preserved.

## Implementation Notes
- Reuse the ftui filter state system (2noh9.3.3); do not create a second filter stack.
- Ensure drilldown uses UTC boundaries consistent with analytics bucketing semantics.
- Avoid triggering double-searches on navigation (debounce or batch state changes).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Drilldown works for:
  - Explorer bucket -> Search
  - Heatmap day -> Search
  - Breakdowns row -> Search
  - Tools row -> Search (when tool filter is supported)
  - Cost/model row -> Search (model filter)
- Back navigation preserves analytics selection and scroll.

## Testing & Logging
- Unit: drilldown state transition produces correct filter state.
- PTY e2e: open analytics -> drilldown -> verify search view is filtered -> back.
- Logging: record drilldown payload (bucket + dim) in debug logs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:10.820814706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","title":"Task: Analytics UI test suite (ftui snapshots + PTY e2e + perf logging)","description":"## Goal
Lock down end-to-end correctness of the full FrankenTUI analytics suite and prevent regressions as views, interactions, and query semantics evolve.

Analytics is especially susceptible to subtle defects (bucket boundaries, coverage math, drilldown scoping, stale caches, layout breakage). This task is the final confidence gate.

## Required Coverage Surface
The suite must cover **all analytics subviews**:
- dashboard
- explorer
- heatmap
- breakdowns
- tools
- cost/models
- coverage
- plans

## Test Layers
1. **Snapshot/golden tests (ftui-harness)**
   - each analytics subview at 80x24 and 120x40
   - representative states: normal, sparse, empty, and loading/error
   - deterministic fixtures for stable diffs

2. **Behavioral unit tests**
   - navigation stack and focus transitions across subviews
   - filter persistence and inheritance
   - deterministic sorting/ranking/tie-break behavior
   - drilldown payload construction correctness

3. **PTY e2e tests**
   - launch `cass tui --once` in headless PTY harness
   - navigate across all analytics subviews
   - execute drilldown to Search from multiple subviews and return
   - assert exit code 0, no panic output, and expected rendered states

4. **Performance guard assertions (non-flaky)**
   - capture query/render timings per view
   - enforce broad safety thresholds in CI (catch catastrophic regressions)

## Logging Requirements
On any failure, emit high-signal diagnostics:
- rendered buffer artifacts and diffs
- selected filters/time-range/context
- query timing + cache-hit trace
- drilldown payload and navigation trace when relevant

## Dependency Policy
This task is intentionally blocked on all analytics view implementation beads so it cannot be prematurely marked complete while major surfaces remain untested.","acceptance_criteria":"1. CI test suite covers every analytics subview (dashboard/explorer/heatmap/breakdowns/tools/cost-models/coverage/plans).
2. Snapshot diffs are deterministic and actionable across target terminal sizes.
3. PTY e2e flow validates full analytics navigation and drilldown/back-stack behavior without panics.
4. Performance logs are captured and thresholded to catch severe regressions.
5. Failure artifacts include enough context (buffers, filters, timings, traces) to diagnose root cause quickly.","notes":"Treat this bead as the release gate for analytics UI reliability. If a new analytics capability lands without tests in this suite, this bead remains incomplete.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:44.556511547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:33:16.662575389Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:44.556511547Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:26.458223802Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:24.733558213Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:44.556511547Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:02.787287834Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:07.631564703Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:10.007835614Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:08.856132216Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:01.597731185Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:30.682765420Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:32:25.915727039Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:44.556511547Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:17:44.556511547Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","title":"Task: Analytics plans view (plan frequency + plan token share + trends + drilldown)","description":"## Objective
Deliver a first-class **Plans Analytics** subview in FrankenTUI that makes planning behavior measurable, explorable, and operationally useful.

This view should answer:
- How often do plans occur?
- How many tokens are plan-attributed over time?
- Which agents/projects/workspaces are most plan-heavy?
- Where are the exact sessions/messages behind a plan spike?

## Scope
1. Add `Plans` subview to Analytics router with command-palette access and keyboard navigation parity.
2. Render plan-centric metrics using analytics query library outputs:
   - plan message count and share
   - plan-attributed tokens and share (from `z9fse.14`)
   - trend lines by hour/day/week/month
3. Provide ranked breakdown tables:
   - by agent
   - by workspace/project
   - by source
   - optional by model (when available)
4. Show quality/coverage diagnostics in-view:
   - detection confidence/coverage notes
   - heuristic version indicator
   - warning states for low-confidence windows
5. Enable drilldown from any plan metric bucket/row to filtered Search with back-stack preservation.

## UX + Interaction Requirements
- Works at both compact and wide terminal sizes.
- Supports fast time-range switching and inherited global filters.
- Uses clear visual cues to distinguish absolute totals vs percentage shares.
- Includes empty/error/loading states with actionable hints.

## Performance Requirements
- Initial render should use cached/pre-aggregated queries where possible.
- Interactions (bucket switch, filter change) should avoid full-table rescans.
- Query timings and cache-hit status should be available in debug logs.

## Test + Logging Requirements
- Snapshot tests:
  - compact and wide layouts
  - normal, sparse, and empty-data fixtures
- Unit tests:
  - plan share calculations and formatting
  - deterministic table sorting/tie-breaks
- PTY e2e tests:
  - navigate to Plans view
  - change range
  - drilldown to Search and return
- Failure logs must include rendered buffers, selected filters, and query timing traces.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Analytics router includes a stable, keyboard-accessible Plans subview.
2. Plans view displays frequency, token attribution/share, trends, and ranked breakdowns from canonical analytics queries.
3. Coverage/confidence diagnostics are visible so users can detect heuristic uncertainty.
4. Drilldown from plan buckets/rows to Search works and preserves back navigation state.
5. Snapshot/unit/PTY e2e tests with detailed logs protect layout, semantics, and interaction correctness.","notes":"This view is the bridge between abstract “planning behavior” metrics and concrete session-level evidence. Treat drilldown and diagnostics as core functionality, not optional polish.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:19:28.000430832Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:30:20.224538332Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:30:20.224423598Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:19:28.000430832Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:30:18.393999990Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:19:28.000430832Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:19:28.000430832Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:19:28.000430832Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","title":"Task: Analytics TUI plumbing (view router, global filters, command palette entries)","description":"## Goal
Add the foundational ftui wiring so “Analytics” becomes a first-class surface in the cass TUI:
- view routing / navigation stack
- global analytics filters (time range, agent, workspace, source)
- command palette entries and consistent key hints

This task is intentionally *not* about building every chart; it’s about making analytics views composable and easy to add.

## Requirements
1. **View router integration**
   - Add an Analytics view variant to the top-level app model.
   - Support subviews (Dashboard / Explorer / Heatmap / Breakdowns / Tools / Cost / Coverage).
   - Back-stack semantics: `Esc` pops view stack; drilldowns push.

2. **Global analytics filter state**
   - Persist within the analytics surface.
   - Filter ribbon (compact pills) at top of analytics views.
   - Filters must be serializable so we can later persist them in `tui_state.json`.

3. **Command palette integration**
   - Add commands:
     - `Analytics: Dashboard`
     - `Analytics: Explorer`
     - `Analytics: Heatmap`
     - `Analytics: Breakdowns`
     - `Analytics: Tools`
     - `Analytics: Cost`
     - `Analytics: Coverage`
   - Add `Analytics: Set time range...`, `Analytics: Filter agent...`, etc.

4. **Key hints + discoverability**
   - Use the ftui hint registry so each analytics subview can expose its own key hints.
   - Common keys: Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter (drilldown), / (search within view), g (go-to).

5. **Headless discipline**
   - Analytics views must render deterministically in headless mode (TUI_HEADLESS=1), so we can test them with snapshots/PTY.

## Acceptance Criteria
- The TUI can enter and exit Analytics surface reliably.
- Analytics filter ribbon appears and updates state when changed.
- Palette entries navigate to each analytics subview (even if some are placeholders initially).
- No panics on small terminals; show graceful “window too small” message.

## Testing & Logging
- Unit: routing state machine (enter analytics, switch view, back stack).
- Snapshot: base analytics shell renders deterministically (no data).
- Logging: trace view transitions and filter changes behind a debug flag.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:20:03.287690135Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","architecture","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:20:03.287585610Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Add the foundational ftui wiring so “Analytics” becomes a first-class surface in the cass TUI:
- view routing / navigation stack
- global analytics filters (time range, agent, workspace, source)
- command palette entries and consistent key hints

This task is intentionally *not* about building every chart; it’s about making analytics views composable and easy to add.

## Requirements
1. **View router integration**
   - Add an Analytics view variant to the top-level app model.
   - Support subviews (Dashboard / Explorer / Heatmap / Breakdowns / Tools / Cost / Coverage).
   - Back-stack semantics: `Esc` pops view stack; drilldowns push.

2. **Global analytics filter state**
   - Persist within the analytics surface.
   - Filter ribbon (compact pills) at top of analytics views.
   - Filters must be serializable so we can later persist them in `tui_state.json`.

3. **Command palette integration**
   - Add commands:
     - `Analytics: Dashboard`
     - `Analytics: Explorer`
     - `Analytics: Heatmap`
     - `Analytics: Breakdowns`

     - `Analytics: Cost`
     - `Analytics: Coverage`
   - Add `Analytics: Set time range...`, `Analytics: Filter agent...`, etc.

4. **Key hints + discoverability**
   - Use the ftui hint registry so each analytics subview can expose its own key hints.
   - Common keys: Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter (drilldown), / (search within view), g (go-to).

5. **Headless discipline**
   - Analytics views must render deterministically in headless mode (TUI_HEADLESS=1), so we can test them with snapshots/PTY.

## Acceptance Criteria

- No panics on small terminals; show graceful “window too small” message.

## Testing & Logging
- Unit: routing state machine (enter analytics, switch view, back stack).
- Snapshot: base analytics shell renders deterministically (no data).
- Logging: trace view transitions and filter changes behind a debug flag.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T01:29:44.467427732Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","architecture","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:20:03.287585610Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","title":"Task: Analytics dashboard view (KPI tiles + sparklines + top movers)","description":"## Goal
Implement the default Analytics dashboard view: a dense, stylish “KPI wall” that answers the most common questions in <5 seconds.

## Layout (80x24 friendly)
- Header: filter ribbon (time range, agent/workspace/source).
- Body: grid of KPI tiles (2-3 columns depending on width).
- Right/bottom: ‘Top movers’ list (agents/workspaces) with deltas vs prior period.
- Footer: key hints.

## KPIs (v1)
All KPIs should be computed from rollups via `crate::analytics` (z9fse.12):
- Tokens today / last 7d / last 30d:
  - show both `api_tokens_total` and `content_tokens_est_total` where useful
  - show coverage % to explain discrepancies
- Burn rate:
  - tokens/hour over last 2h (and trailing 24h average)
- Tool intensity:
  - tool calls per 1k tokens (and absolute tool calls)
- Planning:
  - plan message count + plan token share
- Cost tiles:
  - if cost is available (z9fse.10), show USD today / 30d; otherwise show “cost not available” with hint.

Each KPI tile should include a mini sparkline for trend over the selected range.

## UX
- `Enter` on a KPI tile jumps to Explorer pre-configured to that metric.
- `Enter` on a top-mover row filters Explorer to that agent/workspace.

## Performance
- Dashboard queries should be O(#buckets) and cached for the current filter set.
- Prefer a single multi-query pass per refresh tick rather than dozens of tiny queries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dashboard renders in < 16ms on typical terminals (no jank).
- All KPIs have sensible fallback when a metric is missing.
- Drilldown interactions work and preserve global filters.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot tests for 80x24 and 120x40.
- Unit tests for KPI computation glue code (mostly in analytics query layer).
- PTY e2e: open dashboard, select KPI, drilldown, exit.
- Logging: per-view query timing summary (rows scanned, cache hits).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","title":"Task: Analytics explorer view (interactive time-series: metric/group-by/overlays)","description":"## Goal
Build the interactive “Explorer” view: the terminal equivalent of a Grafana panel builder, but tuned for cass analytics.

## Core Features
1. **Metric selector**
   - api_tokens_total, api_input, api_output, cache_read, cache_creation, thinking
   - content_tokens_est_total
   - tool_call_count
   - plan_message_count
   - coverage_pct
   - (optional) usd_est_total when available (z9fse.10)

2. **Group-by selector**
   - hour | day | week | month

3. **Overlay selector**
   - none (single series)
   - by agent
   - by workspace
   - by source
   - by model (requires z9fse.11)

4. **Chart interactions**
   - crosshair cursor + tooltip (bucket label + value + coverage)
   - zoom presets: 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d, all
   - stacked vs overlaid lines when overlay is enabled

## Performance
- All data comes from rollups via `crate::analytics` (z9fse.12).
- Caching:
  - cache by (filters, group-by, metric, overlay)
  - invalidate on filter change and on index refresh

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a bucket:
  - pushes drilldown into Search view with since/until set to bucket range
- When overlay active:
  - drilldown includes selected series dim (agent/workspace/source/model)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Explorer is usable on 80x24 (controls collapse into a single “controls row”).
- Overlay mode supports at least top-5 series (others grouped as “other”).
- Tooltip values are stable and formatted consistently (k/M suffixes).

## Testing & Logging

- Unit: overlay selection logic (top-N + other) deterministic.
- PTY e2e: open Explorer, toggle group-by, toggle overlay, drilldown.

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","title":"Task: Analytics calendar heatmap view (daily tokens/cost/coverage with drilldown)","description":"## Goal
Implement a calendar-style heatmap (GitHub contributions style) for analytics.

## Metrics / Modes
- Sessions (from daily_stats) (nice even when token data is sparse)
- API tokens (from usage_daily or token_daily_stats)
- Estimated tokens (content_tokens_est_total)
- Cost (usd_est_total) when available (z9fse.10)
- Coverage % (api_coverage_message_count / message_count)

## UI Details
- A full-year grid when space allows; otherwise show rolling 12-week strip.
- Legend: min/median/max labels + color ramp.
- Tooltip: date + exact value + coverage.

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a day opens Explorer pinned to that day.
- `Shift+Enter` opens Search view for that exact day.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Readable on 80x24 (fallback to 12-week strip if too small).
- Color scale is perceptually ordered and theme-aware.
- Drilldown works and preserves global filters.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic heatmap for a known dataset.
- Unit: color bucketing logic (value -> color bin) stable.
- PTY e2e: open heatmap, move cursor, drilldown.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+//! Shared analytics query library.
+//!
+//! Extracts SQL, bucketing, and derived-metric logic from CLI commands into a
+//! reusable module consumed by both `cass analytics *` CLI commands and the
+//! FrankenTUI analytics dashboards.
+//!
+//! # Module structure
+//!
+//! - [`types`] — filter, grouping, result structs, error type
+//! - [`bucketing`] — day_id / hour_id ↔ ISO date conversions
+//! - [`derive`] — safe derived-metric computation
+//! - [`query`] — SQL query builders against rollup tables
+
+pub mod bucketing;
+pub mod derive;
+pub mod query;
+pub mod types;
+
+// Re-export the most commonly used items at the crate::analytics level.
+pub use types::{
+    AnalyticsError, AnalyticsFilter, AnalyticsResult, CoverageInfo, DerivedMetrics, DriftInfo,
+    DriftSignal, GroupBy, SourceFilter, StatusResult, TableInfo, TimeseriesResult, UsageBucket,
+};
